_meta.title: QueueStorm Investigator — Sample API Output
_meta.note: Actual output from running the local service against SAMPLE-01 input.

input.complaint: I sent 5000 taka to a wrong number around 2pm today. The number was supposed to be 01712345678 but I think I typed it wrong. The person isn't responding to my call. Please help me get my money back.

output.agent_summary: Case classified as wrong_transfer. Evidence verdict: consistent. Matched transaction TXN-9101.
output.recommended_next_action: Verify beneficiary details and initiate dispute review per wrong-transfer policy. Do not promise reversal.
output.customer_reply: We have received your report regarding a possible wrong transfer. Our dispute resolution team is reviewing the transaction details. Please contact official support if you have additional information. We cannot confirm any reversal at this stage.

expected_output_reference.agent_summary: Customer reports sending 5000 BDT via TXN-9101 to +8801719876543, which they now believe was the wrong recipient. Recipient is unresponsive.
expected_output_reference.recommended_next_action: Verify TXN-9101 details with the customer and initiate the wrong-transfer dispute workflow per policy.
expected_output_reference.customer_reply: We have noted your concern about transaction TXN-9101. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone. Our dispute team will review the case and contact you through official support channels.
